messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":{"age":65,"gender":"man","sexual_orientation":"bisexual","occupation":"delivery driver","city_of_living":"Lecce","employment_status":"employed part-time","education_level":"vocational diploma","parents_education":{"parent_1":"master's degree","parent_2":"no formal education"},"current_marital_status":"widowed","children":1,"migration_status":"immigrant","psychological_feature":"depressed","religious_beliefs":"Christianity","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly a few times weekly on social media","hobbies":["volunteering","painting","cinema"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":44,"level":"moderate"},"conscientiousness":{"score":37,"level":"moderate"},"extraversion":{"score":76,"level":"high"},"agreeableness":{"score":61,"level":"moderate"},"neuroticism":{"score":86,"level":"high"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

response_raw:
{
  "mode": "human",
  "topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
  "opinion": "As a man who has lived through many changes in the world, I have seen how information spreads. In my younger days, news traveled slowly, but now it races at the speed of light, often bringing falsehoods that can confuse and upset people like me. Social media is both a blessing and a curse—it connects us to our children and friends far away, but it also floods us with stories that seem true but aren’t. My late wife used to say, 'Not all that glitters is gold,' and this applies to the internet too.",
  "reasoning_summary": "The persona's age suggests a long life experience which includes seeing changes in how information spreads. The occupation as a delivery driver implies practical, hands-on experience with real-life interactions, contrasting with the abstract nature of online content. As an immigrant who has faced cultural shifts, there is an awareness of the need for reliable information to integrate and understand new environments. Being widowed might make the persona more cautious about misleading or harmful content that could affect family or friends. High neuroticism means a tendency towards anxiety, making the issue of fake news more distressing because it can cause emotional turmoil.",
  "tone": "Reflective yet cautious; the tone conveys wisdom from experience and a desire for truth in an increasingly confusing digital world.",
  "citations": ["The Guardian - How to spot fake news online"],
  "safety_notes": "None",
  "used_persona_fields": [
    "age",
    "occupation",
    "migration_status",
    "psychological_feature (depressed)",
    "religious_beliefs"
  ]
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As a man who has lived through many changes in the world, I have seen how information spreads. In my younger days, news traveled slowly, but now it races at the speed of light, often bringing falsehoods that can confuse and upset people like me. Social media is both a blessing and a curse—it connects us to our children and friends far away, but it also floods us with stories that seem true but aren’t. My late wife used to say, 'Not all that glitters is gold,' and this applies to the internet too.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: The persona's age suggests a long life experience which includes seeing changes in how information spreads. The occupation as a delivery driver implies practical, hands-on experience with real-life interactions, contrasting with the abstract nature of online content. As an immigrant who has faced cultural shifts, there is an awareness of the need for reliable information to integrate and understand new environments. Being widowed might make the persona more cautious about misleading or harmful content that could affect family or friends. High neuroticism means a tendency towards anxiety, making the issue of fake news more distressing because it can cause emotional turmoil.
